purpose: Test downside-risk budgeting for the existing 14-day cross-sectional momentum research shadow without changing memberships or claiming a new Alpha family.

signal.source: strictly closed 15-minute OKX bars resampled to closed 4-hour bars; risk estimates use only closed 1-hour returns available before entry
signal.membership_rule: top-4 entry, top-6 exit hysteresis; four long and four short
signal.known_at: 04:00 UTC after the signal bar closes
signal.entry: 04:00 UTC open, with 15-minute delayed execution used only as a frozen falsification

primary_variant.risk_measure: mean loss of the worst 5 percent of closed 1-hour log returns
primary_variant.allocation: inverse expected-shortfall loss separately within long and short sides
primary_variant.refresh: recalculate target risk weights only when the selected long or short membership changes

baseline.name: 14-day momentum top-4 entry top-6 exit equal-weight hysteresis

falsification.randomization: circularly shift the complete risk-weighted target path against the original tradable daily entry times

portfolio_increment_gates.comparison: 50 percent existing equal-weight hysteresis plus 50 percent primary downside-risk weighted hysteresis at unchanged unit gross exposure

prohibitions: Do not change the expected-shortfall window, tail fraction, weight cap, refresh rule, membership rule, direction, universe, costs, or neighborhood after opening outcomes.
Do not remove symbols or select a historically superior lookback to rescue a failure.
Do not claim an independent Alpha family or assign a new H number.
Do not promote to formal A-tier from historical results.
Do not enable automatic ordering or position management.
